name: Home
description: Main product listing page with category filtering. Displays products in a grid with skeletal loading states.

name: Product Detail
description: Dynamic product page displaying individual product information fetched by product ID.

name: Search Results
description: Search functionality page. Takes a query parameter (?q=) and displays matching products.

name: Sign In
description: User authentication page with email and password login form. Redirects to home on success.

name: Sign Up
description: User registration page with name, email, password, and confirm password fields.

name: Shopping Cart
description: Authenticated cart page showing all cart items with quantity controls, item removal, and cart totals.

name: Checkout
description: Authenticated checkout page with shipping address, payment method, and order summary.

name: Order Success
description: Order confirmation page displaying a success message with the Order ID after placing an order.

name: Account Settings
description: Authenticated account management page for editing profile, shipping address, password, and notification preferences.

name: Wishlist
description: Authenticated wishlist page displaying saved products with add-to-cart and remove options.

name: My Orders
description: Authenticated orders list page showing all user orders with status and action buttons (cancel, return, replace).

name: Order Details
description: Authenticated order detail page with order tracking timeline, items, payment summary, and shipping address.

name: Help
description: Customer support page with tabs for Contact Us, FAQ, Returns & Refunds, and Shipping Info.
